prompt: Create a realistic tabletop product photo of a handmade layered craft-paper shadowbox figurine: a dynamic fantasy alchemist girl made from stacked cut cardstock, standing on a small oval layered cardboard base. The character has pale icy blue long wavy hair made of separate curled paper layers, a mint green long coat with tan leather-like paper straps, belts, buckles, gloves, and brown boots, posed mid-step as if dancing or presenting a toast. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur. She holds 1 purple potion bottle high in her left hand, and her belt carries exactly 6 small potion vials in white, blue, and amber tones, each built from tiny layered paper pieces. The base includes small paper grass tufts and rocks. Place the figure on a green self-healing cutting mat covered with white cut marks, with a warm shallow-depth-of-field craft workspace background. Include exactly 3 prominent tools or supplies around the figure: a white glue bottle on the left with a kraft label reading Beardy Art Premium Craft Glue, a silver metal ruler on the right, and a silver precision craft knife at the lower right. Scatter brown kraft-paper offcuts around the mat and show stacked cardboard sheets blurred in the background. Use warm workshop lighting, macro photography, highly detailed paper fibers, visible layered edges, soft shadows, realistic handmade miniature texture, whimsical collectible art style inspired by Toxic Party.
